mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle, leading to positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in CPIAUCSL above 3% indicates inflationary pressures, prompting central bank rate hikes that reduce equity valuations and produce negative S&P 500 returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite inflationary signals.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous increase in payroll employment and decrease in unemployment signals a strong labor market, boosting corporate earnings and equity prices over 20 days.
failure_condition: Joint movement of PAYEMS and UNRATE fails to predict SPX returns with Rank IC < 0.05 over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production combined with increasing housing starts signals robust demand conditions, driving S&P 500 forward returns over 60 days.
failure_condition: Positive INDPRO/HOUST trends coincide with SPX negative returns in > 40% of cases over 5-year backtests.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in industrial production above 1% indicates strengthening supply-side dynamics, boosting equity valuations over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth above 1% fails to predict positive 5d SPX returns in > 50% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: During monetary tightening cycles, rising FEDFUNDS combined with low CPIAUCSL signals recession risks, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over 60 days.
failure_condition: Negative 60d SPX returns fail to materialize despite FEDFUNDS > 4% and CPIAUCSL < 2% conditions.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in unemployment below 4% combined with payroll growth above 100k signals labor market overheating, driving SPX negative returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of instances with UNRATE < 4% and PAYEMS > 100k.

mechanism_narrative: Rising residential sales (RSAFS) indicate strong demand for housing, boosting consumer confidence and driving S&P 500 forward returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: Positive RSAFS trends coincide with SPX negative returns in > 40% of cases over 3-year backtests.
